name: greek-electricity-toolkit
description: Tools for analysing Greek electricity bills and comparing provider tariffs.

plugins.name: greek-electricity-toolkit
plugins.description: Read Greek electricity bills (ΔΕΗ/ΗΡΩΝ/Protergia/…), compute the true effective €/kWh behind the headline (the Διακύμανση/ρήτρα trap), and rank provider offers by commitment tier.
